title: platanthera orbiculata
intro: Platanthera orbiculata, also known as the green orchid or round-leaved orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Platanthera orbiculata include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
